archimate:Grouping.name: Digital Workplace Infrastructure Enablers
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Digital Workplace Infrastructure Enablers ABB is a Grouping that enables the set of components and services that enable organizations to create and manage virtual workplaces environments and facilitate their access remotely.
Source: Inspired in Gartner
Source reference: https://www.gartner.com/en/information-technology/glossary/remote-access
Example: The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): PSI Remote Desktop Service from the European Open Science Cloud https://marketplace.eosc-portal.eu/services/remote-desktop-service?from_recommendation_panel=true&fromc=access-physical-einfrastructures
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - infrastructure
Interoperability Saliency: Digital Workplace Infrastructure Enablers ABB is salient for technical interoperability due to it refers to setting up the workplace ecosystem to establish access to European public services remotely to access applications using open specifications and interfaces.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalWorkplaceInfrastructureEnablersGrouping
ABB name: eira:DigitalWorkplaceInfrastructureEnablersGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalWorkplaceInfrastructureEnablersGrouping
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalInfrastructure

properties.value: Digital Workplace Infrastructure Enablers ABB is a Grouping that enables the set of components and services that enable organizations to create and manage virtual workplaces environments and facilitate their access remotely.

The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): PSI Remote Desktop Service from the European Open Science Cloud https://marketplace.eosc-portal.eu/services/remote-desktop-service?from_recommendation_panel=true&fromc=access-physical-einfrastructures

Digital Workplace Infrastructure Enablers ABB is salient for technical interoperability due to it refers to setting up the workplace ecosystem to establish access to European public services remotely to access applications using open specifications and interfaces.
